title: NaN Health Fixer
description: Try to kill an entity with NaN health.
body:
Sometimes, you will encounter entities in the game that fake death with NaN (Not a number) health.

This mod will attempt to kill the faked dead entity and don't let any entity to be hurt by an attack with NaN health amount.

Can be server-side only.

[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
